findings.description: AC-11 and AC-12 lack explicit Given/When/Then format
findings.recommendation: Reformat migration and TTEC ACs into structured GWT

caveats: Two ACs not in Given/When/Then format

findings.description: ADR-002 references SCV availability but does not cite specific DevInt2 evidence of SCV licensing. The sfdc_phone ServiceChannel with VoiceCall entity suggests SCV may be partially enabled.
findings.recommendation: Query DevInt2 for SCV license status or feature permission

findings.description: No sequence diagram for the inbound call flow (Connect -> CTI Adapter -> Screen Pop -> VoiceCall creation)
findings.recommendation: Add Mermaid sequence diagram for the primary call flow

reRetrievalQueries: Check if Service Cloud Voice license is active in the org
caveats: Missing sequence diagram for call flow

findings.description: No bulk test specified for Omni-Channel routing under 200+ concurrent voice work items
findings.recommendation: Add bulk test T-15 for concurrent routing load

findings.description: CallCenter XML update references placeholder instance URL 'your-instance.my.connect.aws'
findings.recommendation: Parameterize the URL in deployment scripts

findings.description: All 15 tests marked NOT RUN. No deployment has occurred to orgsyncng. E2E validation is entirely deferred.
findings.recommendation: Execute deployment and run tests in next iteration

caveats: All tests NOT RUN -- deployment pending

findings.description: S3 bucket encryption verification is documented as a recommendation but no evidence of actual S3 policy review. For HIPAA-regulated call recordings containing PHI, this is a blocking concern.
findings.recommendation: Escalate S3 encryption audit to Information Security team before deployment

findings.description: Named Credential for Amazon Connect API is recommended but not yet created in metadata inventory
findings.recommendation: Add Named Credential to 05-buildfix metadata inventory

refinementDirectives: Add Named Credential metadata to build artifact
Document S3 encryption verification as a deployment gate
reRetrievalQueries: Check if Named Credential for Amazon Connect exists in DevInt2
caveats: Named Credential not in metadata inventory
